title: Department Manager Vacancy at Shoppers Stop - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Shoppers Stop - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Shoppers Stop! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Shoppers Stop:
Shoppers Stop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop!
